case_title: LORENZO, AGNES E. VS JULIAN, MARS A.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $450.00 FILED BY LORENZO, AGNES E. AS TO DEFENDANT JULIAN, MARS A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT JULIAN, MARS A.
